comments:
DragState - drag and drop interaction atoms.

Models the complete drag lifecycle including source, target,
preview, and drop effects for Frame.io-level file upload UX.

declarations.comments: Can target accept the drag type?
declarations.title: isValidTarget

declarations.comments: Idle drag state (no drag in progress)
declarations.title: idleDragState

declarations.comments: Is there a valid drop target?
declarations.title: hasValidDropTarget

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Reactive.DragState
